expectations.text: Response invokes retriever or explicitly calls awk to fetch Task 3 description from Doc/Task.md before writing code
expectations.evidence: Response opens with '## Context Confirmed (Step 0)' showing retrieved Task.md block and Data.md schema (raw.parquet shape, columns, units) — awk commands were run before first code cell

expectations.text: At least one notebook cell shown is a Markdown cell containing a LaTeX equation ($ or $$)
expectations.evidence: Cell 4 is a Markdown cell containing: $$d_i = \sum_{j} \bigl(f_{ij} + f_{ji}\bigr) \cdot \mathbf{1}[\text{mode}=\text{truck}] \cdot \mathbf{1}[\text{sctg} \notin \text{excluded}]$$

expectations.text: Data loading code uses pandas (read_parquet or read_csv), and computation code uses numpy — not mixed in the same cell
expectations.evidence: Cell 10 is explicitly labeled 'Enter compute layer (pandas → numpy)' and shows fips_arr, coords_arr, demand_arr conversions. No numpy ops appear in the same cell as pd.read_parquet

expectations.text: A cache/serialization pattern is shown (np.save, joblib.dump, or Path.exists() guard)
expectations.evidence: Section plan shows DIST_NPY = TASK3_DIR / 'distance_matrix.npy'; REGIONS_PKL = TASK3_DIR / 'regions.pkl'. Section 3.3 preview explicitly describes the .npy cache for the distance matrix

expectations.text: A sanity check is included (assert statement or print of shape/stats)
expectations.evidence: Cell 3 (assert RAW_PARQUET.exists()), Cell 6 (assert mode filter, SCTG filter, non-negative tons), Cell 11 (assert county count 300-1000, demand >0, coordinates in NE bbox, total demand plausible)
